meeting.title: Vrijen Attawar And Chris Hanson Transcript 2026 01 29t00 30 00.000z
meeting.summary: Vrijen Attawar and Chris Hanson discussed their experiences with ADHD management and building technology products as non-technical founders. V shared insights from his coaching work with Heather, reframing habits as behaviors rather than moral judgments, while Chris reflected on nearly a year of developing his own ADHD-focused product with technical assistance. The conversation centered on the challenges non-technical founders face when translating product vision into technical execution, the value of coaching and support systems for neurodivergent individuals, and the delicate balance between novelty and consistency that ADHD minds must navigate. Both participants acknowledged the difficulty of the first year in product development and validated the importance of finding appropriate technical guidance while maintaining focus on core product methodology.
